Bernardo Silva.note: Bernardo gives Portugal control on the right and inside, keeping attacks alive with small touches.
Bernardo Silva.noteZh: 贝尔纳多给葡萄牙右路和内线控制，用细小触球让进攻延续。

Bruno Fernandes.note: Bruno gives Portugal vertical creativity, always looking for the pass that turns control into a chance.
Bruno Fernandes.noteZh: 布鲁诺给葡萄牙纵向创造力，总是在寻找把控制转成机会的传球。

Cristiano Ronaldo.note: Ronaldo remains Portugal's penalty-box reference, built for crosses, rebounds, and decisive touches.
Cristiano Ronaldo.noteZh: C罗仍是葡萄牙禁区参照点，适合传中、反弹球和决定性触球。

Diogo Costa.note: Diogo Costa gives Portugal modern goalkeeping security, saving shots and starting attacks cleanly.
Diogo Costa.noteZh: 迪奥戈·科斯塔给葡萄牙现代门将安全感，能扑救，也能干净发起进攻。

Diogo Dalot.note: Dalot gives Portugal flexible full-back cover, switching roles without breaking the structure.
Diogo Dalot.noteZh: 达洛特给葡萄牙灵活边后卫保障，能切换角色而不破坏结构。

Francisco Conceicao.note: Conceição gives Portugal a low-center winger, dangerous when he attacks a defender from a standstill.
Francisco Conceicao.noteZh: 孔塞桑给葡萄牙低重心边锋，当他静止起步冲击防守者时很危险。

Francisco Trincao.note: Trincão adds left-footed craft, drifting inside to combine or bend shots from the edge.
Francisco Trincao.noteZh: 特林康增加左脚技术，能内收配合或在禁区边缘兜射。

Goncalo Guedes.note: Guedes gives Portugal direct attacking speed, useful when the game needs a quick route to goal.
Goncalo Guedes.noteZh: 格德斯给葡萄牙直接进攻速度，当比赛需要快速通向球门的路线时很有用。

Goncalo Inacio.note: Inácio gives Portugal left-footed build-up quality, opening angles from the back line.
Goncalo Inacio.noteZh: 伊纳西奥给葡萄牙左脚后场组织质量，能从防线打开角度。

Goncalo Ramos.note: Ramos gives Portugal a mobile striker, pressing high and attacking first-time service in the box.
Goncalo Ramos.noteZh: 拉莫斯给葡萄牙机动中锋，能高位压迫并攻击禁区内第一时间传球。

Joao Cancelo.note: Cancelo gives Portugal a playmaker from full-back, stepping inside to change passing angles.
Joao Cancelo.noteZh: 坎塞洛给葡萄牙边后卫位置的组织者，能内收改变传球角度。

Joao Felix.note: Félix gives Portugal soft-touch creativity, useful when tight spaces need disguise and timing.
Joao Felix.noteZh: 菲利克斯给葡萄牙细腻创造力，当狭小空间需要伪装和时机时很有用。

Joao Neves.note: Neves gives Portugal midfield intensity, winning duels and keeping the next pass forward.
Joao Neves.noteZh: 若昂·内维斯给葡萄牙中场强度，能赢下对抗并让下一脚向前。

Jose Sa.note: Sá gives Portugal experienced goalkeeper depth, steady when matches ask for crosses and reactions.
Jose Sa.noteZh: 若泽·萨给葡萄牙有经验的门将深度，当比赛需要处理传中和反应时很稳定。

Matheus Nunes.note: Nunes gives Portugal carrying power through midfield, changing the game with one forward surge.
Matheus Nunes.noteZh: 努内斯给葡萄牙中场带球力量，能用一次向前冲刺改变比赛。

Nelson Semedo.note: Semedo gives Portugal recovery speed on the right, useful against counters and wide runners.
Nelson Semedo.noteZh: 塞梅多给葡萄牙右侧回追速度，适合应对反击和边路跑动者。

Nuno Mendes.note: Mendes gives Portugal elite left-side burst, carrying through pressure and recovering just as fast.
Nuno Mendes.noteZh: 努诺·门德斯给葡萄牙顶级左侧爆发，能带球穿压，也能同样快速回追。

Pedro Neto.note: Neto gives Portugal explosive wide speed, turning early isolation into low crosses and shots.
Pedro Neto.noteZh: 内托给葡萄牙爆发边路速度，能把早期单挑转成低平传中和射门。

Rafael Leao.note: Leão gives Portugal a game-breaking left wing, devastating when he can run into open grass.
Rafael Leao.noteZh: 莱奥给葡萄牙能打破比赛的左翼，当他能冲进开阔空间时极具破坏力。

Renato Veiga.note: Veiga gives Portugal flexible defensive cover, useful across centre-back, full-back, or midfield roles.
Renato Veiga.noteZh: 维加给葡萄牙灵活防守保障，可覆盖中卫、边后卫或中场角色。

Ruben Dias.note: Dias gives Portugal defensive authority, organising the box and demanding clean details.
Ruben Dias.noteZh: 鲁本·迪亚斯给葡萄牙防守权威，能组织禁区并要求细节干净。

Ruben Neves.note: Neves gives Portugal long-range passing and shooting, stretching opponents from deep midfield.
Ruben Neves.noteZh: 鲁本·内维斯给葡萄牙后腰位置的长传和远射，从深处拉伸对手。

Rui Silva.note: Rui Silva gives Portugal another reliable goalkeeper option for depth across the tournament.
Rui Silva.noteZh: 鲁伊·席尔瓦给葡萄牙另一个可靠门将选择，为整届赛事提供深度。

Samu Costa.note: Samu gives Portugal midfield bite, useful when the game needs tackles before invention.
Samu Costa.noteZh: 萨穆给葡萄牙中场硬度，当比赛需要先抢断再创造时很有用。

Tomas Araujo.note: Araújo gives Portugal mobile centre-back depth, comfortable defending space and passing out.
Tomas Araujo.noteZh: 阿劳若给葡萄牙机动中卫深度，能防守空间并舒服出球。

Vitinha.note: Vitinha gives Portugal elite midfield rhythm, escaping pressure and connecting attacks with short passes.
Vitinha.noteZh: 维蒂尼亚给葡萄牙顶级中场节奏，能摆脱压力并用短传衔接进攻。
